description.text: Shoves an object.

When push comes to shove, you're the one doing the shoving. With this skill, you have a limited ability to move objects around the dungeon. Sometimes you push a little too hard and end up breaking whatever you were pushing, so be careful. Also, don't point this at a door: the dungeon will collapse or something.
You have a knack for always having the right tool for the job. Maybe not the job you're currently working on, but a job nonetheless.
You've learned from watching batties how to emit a low-frequency hum that harmonizes with the environment around you. If you're looking for a fragile wall, this is the way to find it.
...which is a fancy way of saying 'teleport wherever you like, as long as it's in a straight line'. So it's not actually very unfettered. Who named this ability?
HOLY CRAP! No one warned you about this! Don't use this too often: you can and will kill yourself with it if you're not careful.

You know Krong is a fickle god, and you've studied the ways that some creatures can render useful objects into non-useful husks of their former glory. Through in-depth study, meditation, and a training montage involving 80's hair metal, a volcano, and Mr. Miyagi, you've learned how to reverse those effects...sort of.
Sometimes, there's just a wall in your way.
The wildly inaccurate SCIENCE! of meteorology at work!
Better bundle up in front of the fire with a cup of cocoa.
Good thing you're already underground.
Gonna be a scorcher today.
And look at this interaction, how it creates this crenellated cloud structure that builds off the air stream!
So much meeeeat.
Wet people zap real easy!
OH GOD IT BURNS.
Sweet purifying, cleansing rain.
Summon a clone.
Today's forecast: cloudy with a chance of GIANT FALLING ROCKS.
Good lord, that's horrific.
Blood, blood everywhere.
Your fearsome gaze causes your enemies to cower before you or flee in terror.
Glory in the slaughter of your enemies and take their strength as your own!
Blood, blood everywhere.
Blood, blood everywhere.
Not everything about having monster spirits following you around is a good thing. Apparently, you did something to annoy one of them.
You have spirits following you around for a while before they departs for...elsewhere. They whisper to you, usually about when to consider moving your arse.
You've asked a couple of your spirits to protect you from harm. They're doing their best.
The proper term is 'smite evil,' not 'bump uglies'.
You can empower your sword with righteous energies for a short time.
You can shield yourself with shining light for a short time.
By knowing your enemy, you are better able to defend against them and to overcome their defenses. Enemies do learn, however, so this will only work a few times.
By the power of Krong, you are HEALED!
You are magically infused with fire. Your spellsword skills will play off of this energy and will be fire-related.
You are magically infused with electricity. Your spellsword skills will play off this energy and will be electricity-related.
You are magically infused with aether. Your spellsword skills will play off this energy and will be aethereal.
You are magically infused with cold. Your spellsword skills will play off this energy and will be cold-related.
U NO SEE THIS EVAR

The most basic thing a spellsword learns is how to activate a magical 'mode'. Using such a mode will align the elements that the rest of their spellsword training teaches and shield them from that element.

By reaching into your elemental self, you can draw forth some of that energy and use it to damage an opponent. This is not without cost: your ability to do this is limited by your mana pool. Scales to Haywire chance.
Through extensive training, you have learned to focus and retain some of your conflagratory self even when in another mode.
Through extensive training, you have learned to focus and retain some of your electrical self even when in another mode.
Through extensive training, you have learned to focus and retain some of your aethereal self even when in another mode.
Through extensive training, you have learned to focus and retain some of your hyperboric self even when in another mode.

As your spellsword skills hone themselves, you find yourself able to intensify your Attunement, granting you a larger benefit when Attuned. Further, you can retain some of that energy even when in another mode.
You can now throw your elemental energies about. This is an expensive and risky tactic: expending all your energy on vortices will leave you unable to perform arcane strikes.

spell.name: Check for Hyperborean Intensified Focus For Channeling
Check for Aethereal Intensified Focus For Channeling

effect.spell: Check for Hyperborean Intensified Focus For Channeling

spell.name: Check for Voltaic Intensified Focus For Channeling

effect.spell: Check for Aethereal Intensified Focus For Channeling

spell.name: Check for Conflagratory Intensified Focus For Channeling

effect.spell: Check for Voltaic Intensified Focus For Channeling
Check for Conflagratory Intensified Focus For Channeling

description.text: The ultimate spellsword technique involves careful planning: this ability can be used as a basic--albeit expensive--attack skill, but when you have advanced focus in all four of your elemental foci, you can empower this attack to an absurd degree.
Footy traps are a basic device that impedes the movement of those unfortunate to step into one. You can call these directly from the Paraelemental Plane of Traps to any place of your choosing.
Midas traps, when triggered, transform small portions of their victim into gold coins. This ability lets you summon organic, free-range midas traps directly into your immediate surroundings.

Deadfall traps (also known as load-bearing traps) drop a pile of rubble onto whoever happens to blunder into their trigger. This power lets you craft bespoke, artisanal deadfall traps wherever you point.

Explosive runes violently explode when read, touched, or sometimes even just when left alone. They're very volatile. This power lets you scribe masterfully written calligraphy that explodes anywhere within your sight.

Vacuum traps suck all the air out of an area and pull anything inside it towards the center. Hapless creatures within its range will find it difficult to breathe. This power lets you source vintage vacuum traps directly from the Paraelemental Plane of Traps.

Blink traps send their victims careening around in random directions through magical displacement. Since these traps are very inefficient, they use some of the victim's body to power the trap, transmuting portions of their body into arcane energy. This power places hand-crafted, antique blink traps gently onto the floor nearby.

Thunderbolt traps are a shocking flash and a bang (not to be confused with a flashbang). This skill summons forth a rustic, farm-to-table thunderbolt trap from the Quasiparaelemental Demiplane of Electrical Traps.

Found on the edges of the Quasiparaelemental Demiplane of Evil Traps, nethercurse traps are a particularly vile trap that is often described with phrases like 'overkill', 'extreme prejudice', and 'I think I found his finger'. This ability lets you put one nearby. Just...not too nearby. You don't want to get any on you.
The terrible horrors of the Nethercurse have taken their toll on your body!
Bro, you're so totally ripped now, bro.
Drain their vitality and make it your own, bro. It's easier than pumping iron.
The most basic (and in truth, only) means of actual attack in brofistery. Still, casting fist is pretty awesome. Sometimes, you can make it explode.
Bro, do me a solid and punch that tool right in his fat face.
For a short while, these dudes are your bros.
With your Broforce activated, you have become one of the three champions!
Dadinavian wizards must be as tranquil as the forest. This spell will increase your magical power as long as you can remain tranquil.
Strength of a Raging Fire improves the power of Fire Within.
Dadinavian wizards must possess the burning passion of The Grill deep in their hearts. This spell will take that burning passion and inflict it directly onto your enemies.
Dadinavian wizards must be as swift as the coursing river. This spell will increase your ability to dodge, sneak, and strike enemies.

Dadinavian wizards must strike with the force of a great typhoon. This spell will increase your physical and mental power as long as you can avoid getting hit. Bonus: the effects of Fire Within will be improved while this spell is active.
Dadinavian wizards must have the strength of a raging fire. This spell will increase your resistances, as well as improve the effects of Fire Within while this spell is active.
Your mysteriousness has improved the power of Strength of a Raging Fire.
Your mysteriousness has improved the power of Force of a Great Typhoon.
Your mysteriousness has improved the power of Swift as the Coursing River.
Your mysteriousness has improved the power of Tranquil as a Forest.

spell.name: Mysterious as the Dark Side of the Moon

description.text: Dadinavian wizards must be as mysterious as the dark side of the moon. This spell will increase your defenses and make you half-real, and will have additional effects if you have other Dadinavian spells active.
You're no Sarah, but you're close enough. Maybe you're a Hoggle? Or a Ludo?
The Diggle God of Mediocrity feebly asks for dirt? Or something? To dig, possibly?
Incredible arcane energies course through your veins! Doing what, you have no idea, but they're doing STUFF. And THINGS. MAGIC things!
DRINK, MY CHILD, and in so doing, worship me!

digglegod.name: Diggle God of Mediocrity
digglegod.description: The Diggle God of Mediocrity feebly asks for dirt? Or something? To dig, possibly?

digglegod.name: Diggle God of Booze
digglegod.description: The Diggle God of Booze demands BEVERAGES. Preferably ALCOHOLIC ONES.

description.text: GET IT OFF GET IT OFF GET IT OFF GET IT OFF
You can feel your strength slipping away...
You can feel your mind slipping away...
You can feel your mind slipping away...
You can feel your mind slipping away...
You can feel your mind slipping away...
You can feel your mind slipping away...

spell.name: Staked by the Stake of Staking

description.text: You thirst for battle.
Your hands move impossibly fast, blocking incoming fire easily.
Your weapon dances of its own accord, striking back at your opponents viciously.
Your body's metabolism accelerates to superhuman levels, knitting flesh quickly.
Your mind becomes clearer than ever before.
In desperation, you lash out around you with newfound strength.
Channeling your fear into your spells, you increase your magical abilities tremendously.
For a few moments, you can shrug off blows that would fell a lesser hero.
For a few moments, you can sidestep blows that would fell a lesser hero.
Never tell me the odds either.
Heals based on your alchemy level.
Restores mana based on your alchemy level.
Deals voltaic damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals conflagratory damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals acidic damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals hyperborean damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals spectral elemental damage based on your alchemy level.
Your alchemical prowess has magnified your attacks, allowing you to drain your enemies' life force for your own.
Your alchemical prowess has magnified your attacks, allowing you to drain your enemies' mental energies for your own.
Your alchemical prowess has magnified your brain power, allowing you to learn more from your enemies' defeats.
Your alchemical prowess has magnified your brain power, allowing you to learn more from your enemies' defeats.
Deals conflagratory damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals hyperborean damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
Deals damage based on your alchemy level.
This terrible concoction increases its virility (ha!) with your alchemical prowess.
Magically charms a monster into giving up their evil ways to become your buddy ... for a short time. Then they just stab you in the back again.
I put on my robe and diggle hat.
Dear lord, it burns! Why does it burn?!
